children.text: the term “Board” means the Board of Trustees of the James Madison Memorial Fellowship Foundation;
the term “Foundation” means the James Madison Memorial Fellowship Foundation;
the term “institution of higher education” has the same meaning given that term by ; andsection 1001 of this title
the term “secondary school” has the same meaning given that term by .section 7801 of this title
